components.title: Components preview

components.dividerBody: Subtle separators that work in Yin and Yang themes.
components.sheetBody: New selection pattern with backdrop, ESC, and scroll lock.
components.scrollWindowBody: Glass panels for longer reading flows.
components.scrollWindowDialogBody: This scrollable glass panel supports long-form content without leaving the page.

components.alertDialogBody: Focused decisions with clear call-to-action choices.
components.alertDialogPromptMessage: Would you like to apply this change now?
components.infoPopoverBody: Small inline explanations that stay close to the content.
components.infoPopoverContent: Short notes can live here without disrupting the main flow.

components.cardFlipBody: Flip the card with motion or the control below.
components.cardFlipFront: A grounded snapshot for the day ahead.
components.cardFlipBack: More details and a softer explanation appear on the reverse.
components.railBody: Glass on the outside, solid cards that glide on top.
components.chartsBody: Reusable radar and rounded bar visuals styled for Yin and Yang.
components.buttonsBody: Reusable actions with size and variant controls.

help.title: Luck Trend
help.body: The luck trend chart shows how your fortune score changes month by month. Tap any month to see the score and a brief reading for that period.

help.title: Monthly Overview
help.body: A summary of the month's energy and how it interacts with your personal BaZi chart. This gives you the overall theme and tone for the month ahead.

help.title: Luck & Avoid
help.body: A summary of the activities, directions, and choices most aligned with this month's energy (Luck) and those best avoided (Avoid).

help.title: Fortune Hints
help.body: Practical guidance for the month: your lucky colour, lucky number, and the active and weak elements. Use these to align your choices with the month's energy.

domains.title: Life domains
domains.locked: Premium required to reveal this insight.

help.title: Life Domains
help.body: The six life domains — Career, Wealth, Relationship, Health, Study, and Family — each receive a different level of activation from the month's energy. Premium unlocks the full analysis.

help.title: Day Master × Month
help.body: This section shows how your Day Master element interacts with the current month's Heavenly Stem and Earthly Branch. The interaction type (e.g. producing, controlling) shapes the month's dominant themes.

help.title: Protection
help.body: A personalised strategy to protect your energy and mitigate challenging influences this month. Based on your Day Master and the month's elemental interactions.

chart.title: Bazi Chart
chart.subtitle: The Blueprint of Your Destiny
chart.strongestElement: Your chart shows {element} as the strongest element ({score}), indicating a dominant influence in your life path.
chart.weakestElement: Conversely, {element} is the weakest ({score}), suggesting areas where you may need to cultivate balance and awareness.

daily.title: Daily Fortune
daily.unlockDont: Upgrade to Premium to see what to avoid

glossary.dayMaster: The Heavenly Stem of your birth day, representing your core self and personality.
glossary.heavenlyStem: One of the 10 celestial stems in Chinese astrology, representing yang energy.
glossary.earthlyBranch: One of the 12 terrestrial branches in Chinese astrology, representing yin energy.
glossary.tenGod: The relationship between your Day Master and other stems, indicating life aspects.
glossary.pillar: A combination of Heavenly Stem and Earthly Branch representing a time period.
glossary.fiveElements: Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, and Water - the fundamental energies in Bazi.
glossary.luckPillar: 10-year cycles that influence your fortune throughout life.

zodiacPosition.head: Head of Year
zodiacPosition.headDesc: Born in the opening phase of this zodiac year.
zodiacPosition.middleDesc: Born in the peak phase of this zodiac year.
zodiacPosition.tailDesc: Born in the closing phase of this zodiac year.

info.dayMaster: Your Day Master is the Heavenly Stem of your Day Pillar. It represents your core self — your personality, strengths, and the lens through which you experience life. Everything in your chart is interpreted relative to your Day Master.
info.fourPillars: The Four Pillars (Year, Month, Day, Hour) are the foundation of your Bazi chart. Each pillar contains a Heavenly Stem and Earthly Branch, encoding the energy of the moment you were born. Together they reveal your destiny blueprint.
info.elementBalance: The Five Elements — Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, Water — are the building blocks of Bazi. Your chart's element distribution shows which energies are strong or weak in your life, guiding what to cultivate and what to balance.

luckPillars.title: Luck Pillars
luckPillars.body: Luck Pillars are 10-year cycles that activate different parts of your Bazi chart. Each pillar brings a new Heavenly Stem and Earthly Branch that interacts with your birth chart, shaping the dominant themes of that decade.

info.currentLuckPillar: Your current Luck Pillar is the 10-year cycle you are living through right now. The Heavenly Stem acts on your upper chart (mind, career, relationships) while the Earthly Branch acts on your lower chart (body, resources, foundations).

tenGods.title: Ten Gods
tenGods.body: The Ten Gods describe how each element in your chart relates to your Day Master. They reveal roles and themes: wealth, power, creativity, support, and competition. Each god has a positive and a challenging expression.

info.tenGod_friend: Friend (比肩): Same element, same polarity as your Day Master. Represents peers, siblings, and competition. Brings solidarity and rivalry.
info.tenGod_robWealth: Rob Wealth (劫財): Same element, opposite polarity. Represents rivals who take what is yours. Can also bring bold, decisive energy.
info.tenGod_eatingGod: Eating God (食神): The element your Day Master produces, same polarity. Represents creativity, enjoyment, talent, and nurturing. A positive star.
info.tenGod_hurtingOfficer: Hurting Officer (傷官): The element your Day Master produces, opposite polarity. Represents unconventional thinking, rebellion, and brilliance. Powerful but needs direction.
info.tenGod_directWealth: Direct Wealth (正財): The element your Day Master controls, opposite polarity. Represents stable income, discipline, and earned resources.
info.tenGod_indirectWealth: Indirect Wealth (偏財): The element your Day Master controls, same polarity. Represents windfall, investment, and the father figure.
info.tenGod_directOfficer: Direct Officer (正官): The element that controls your Day Master, opposite polarity. Represents authority, structure, and the spouse (for women). A star of responsibility.
info.tenGod_sevenKillings: Seven Killings (七殺): The element that controls your Day Master, same polarity. Represents pressure, power, and transformation. Can be a star of great achievement or great challenge.
info.tenGod_directResource: Direct Resource (正印): The element that produces your Day Master, opposite polarity. Represents support, learning, and the mother figure. A nurturing star.
info.tenGod_indirectResource: Indirect Resource (偏印): The element that produces your Day Master, same polarity. Represents unconventional knowledge, intuition, and independence.
info.zodiacPosition: The zodiac year is divided into three phases — Head (months 1–4), Middle (months 5–8), and Tail (months 9–12). Your birth month determines which phase you belong to, influencing how you experience the energy of your zodiac year.
info.firstHalfLuck: The first half of the year (roughly January to June) is governed by the Heavenly Stem of the annual pillar. This period tends to affect your mind, career, and outward actions.
info.secondHalfLuck: The second half of the year (roughly July to December) is governed by the Earthly Branch of the annual pillar. This period tends to affect your body, relationships, and inner resources.
info.annualFlow: The Annual Flow describes how the current year's energy interacts with your personal Bazi chart. It reveals which life domains are activated, what opportunities arise, and what challenges to navigate.
info.monthlyFlow: The Monthly Flow shows how each month's energy interacts with your chart. Monthly pillars create shorter cycles of activation, bringing specific themes to the foreground for 30 days.
info.wisdomStar: The Wisdom Star (文昌) appears when specific elements align in your chart or the current year. It enhances learning ability, exam luck, and intellectual clarity. (add: full Wisdom Star explanation)
info.romanceStar: The Romance Star (桃花) is activated by specific Earthly Branches. It attracts romantic energy, social charm, and interpersonal opportunities. (add: full Romance Star explanation)
info.specialInfluence: Special Influence Stars are rare configurations in your chart or the current year that carry significant impact — both positive and challenging. (add: full Special Influence explanation)
info.auspiciousDirection: Your auspicious direction is determined by your Day Master's element. Facing or travelling in this direction during important activities can support your energy. (add: full direction calculation explanation)
info.activityRecommendation: Based on today's energy, certain types of activity are more aligned with the day's flow. Outdoor activities, travel, or staying home each carry different energy costs and benefits. (add: full activity recommendation explanation)
info.yinYang: Yin and Yang are the two fundamental polarities in Chinese metaphysics. Your Day Master is either Yin or Yang, which shapes how you express your element's energy — Yin is receptive and internal, Yang is expressive and outward.
info.compatibility: Bazi compatibility examines how two people's charts interact. It looks at element clashes, combinations, and the Ten God relationships between Day Masters to reveal the dynamics of a relationship.
info.luckPillarGod: The dominant Ten God in your current Luck Pillar shapes the overarching theme of this 10-year period. For example, a Direct Officer pillar brings structure and authority themes; a Seven Killings pillar brings pressure and transformation.

yearlySummary.title: Year at a Glance
yearlySummary.body: A high-level overview of how the year's energy interacts with your personal chart. Includes your zodiac animal, the year's element, and the overall theme for the 12 months ahead.

yearlyPeriods.title: Year in Three Phases
yearlyPeriods.body: The year is divided into three phases: Beginning (Jan–Apr), Middle (May–Aug), and End (Sep–Dec). Each phase is governed by different elemental interactions, creating distinct windows of opportunity and challenge.

zodiacReading.title: Zodiac Reading
zodiacReading.body: Your Chinese Zodiac animal is determined by your birth year. The zodiac position (Head, Middle, Tail) indicates which phase of the zodiac year you were born in, shaping how you experience this year's energy.

yearPillar.title: Year Pillar
yearPillar.body: The Year Pillar for the current year consists of a Heavenly Stem and Earthly Branch. Together they encode the dominant energy of the year and interact with your personal chart to reveal annual themes.

luckSplit.title: First & Second Half Luck
luckSplit.body: The first half (Jan–Jun) is governed by the Heavenly Stem; the second half (Jul–Dec) by the Earthly Branch. Each half activates different aspects of your chart.

lifeDomains.title: Life Domains
lifeDomains.body: The six life domains — Career, Wealth, Relationship, Health, Study, and Family — each receive a different level of activation from the year's energy. Premium unlocks the full analysis for each domain.

monthlyPredictions.title: Monthly Predictions
monthlyPredictions.body: Each month carries its own elemental energy that interacts with your chart. The chart shows the relative luck score for each month; tap a month to read the detailed prediction.

specialStars.title: Special Stars
specialStars.body: Special Stars are rare configurations that appear when specific elements align in your chart and the current year. They can bring exceptional opportunities or significant challenges.

protection.title: Protection Strategy
protection.body: A personalised strategy to protect your energy and mitigate challenging influences during the year. Based on your Day Master and the year's elemental interactions.

luckAvoid.title: Luck & Avoid
luckAvoid.body: A summary of the activities, directions, and choices most aligned with this year's energy (Luck) and those best avoided (Avoid).

luckPillarTimeline.title: Luck Pillar Timeline
luckPillarTimeline.body: Your personal timeline of 10-year Luck Pillars from birth. Each pillar activates a new Heavenly Stem and Earthly Branch, shaping the dominant themes of that decade.
